blocks.text: 9. Grab rail removal
10. Map light removal
11. Cargo area light removal
12. Roof Lining Removal
Tilt both rear seatbacks forward. Remove the headrests from the front seats on both sides, shift them fully forward and fold the seatbacks backward.
Disconnect the harness clips (B, C) of the interior wire harness (A) from the body at the front pillar and inside the instrument panel. Disconnect the coupler (D).
Vehicles equipped with City Brake Active System: Disconnect coupler (A).
Disconnect the harness clip (B) and coupler (C) of the feeder wire (A).
Remove the coupler clip (B) on the feeder wire (A) and disconnect the coupler (C).
Remove the clips (B, C) from the roof lining (A).

items: Work shall be performed in such a way that the roof lining is not bent, wrinkled, or scratched.

blocks.text: Remove both front door opening seals (A), both rear opening trims (B), and the tailgate weather strip (C) as necessary, and lower the roof lining (D).

items: Work shall be performed in such a way as to avoid scratching the roof lining.
Do not force it down and do not damage it.
The work should be done while being held by another person.

blocks.text: Remove the roof lining (A) from the tailgate opening to the outside.

items: The roof lining must be worked on so as not to bend, crease, or scratch it.

blocks.text: 13. Interior Wire Harness and Feeder Wire Removal
If necessary, remove the cushion tape (A) and remove the interior wire harness (C) and feeder wire (D) from the roof lining (B).
14. Remove driver's side front roof side pad and grab rail bracket (vehicles without side curtain airbags)
If necessary, remove the front roof side pads (A) and remove the grab rail bracket (B).
15. Remove the side pad and grab rail bracket from the passenger side front roof (vehicles without side curtain airbags).
If necessary, remove the front roof side pads (A) and remove the grab rail bracket (B).
16. Center roof side pad removal (side curtains without airbags)
If necessary, remove the center roof side pad (A).
17. Remove rear roof side pad and grab rail bracket (vehicles without side curtain airbags)
If necessary, remove the rear roof side pads (A) and remove the grab rail bracket (B).
18. Installation Precautions
Installation is the reverse of the removal procedure.
1. Roof lining inspection

Vehicles equipped with side curtain airbags: If the side curtain airbags are deployed, replace them with new roof linings. Vehicles equipped with side curtain airbags: If the side curtain airbags are not deployed, perform the following inspection and replace the applicable items, if any.

items.text: Severe breakage or tearing of roof lining (A)
Severe breakage or tearing of roof lining (A)
Roof lining sun visor mounting holes (B) torn or deformed
Roof lining sun visor mounting holes (B) torn or deformed
Tear or deformation of grab rail mounting holes (C)
Tear or deformation of grab rail mounting holes (C)
Inspect clips for damage and replace if necessary.
Inspect clips for damage and replace if necessary.
Clips, fasteners, and hooks should be set securely to prevent floating.
Clips, fasteners, and hooks should be set securely to prevent floating.
Replace the cushion tape with a new one.
Replace the cushion tape with a new one.
